headline: FIS Advances Cloud Banking Push Through Frankfurt International Bank Deal
summary: FIS adds Frankfurt International Bank as a cloud banking client, reinforcing its cloud-first strategy and expanding recurring revenue opportunities in digital banking.

headline: Here's Why You Should Hold Omnicom Group Stock in Your Portfolio
summary: OMC's broad service portfolio, AI platform expansion and major client wins support growth. Its competition and liquidity remain key risks.
